task_completion.description: Verify that a User Group named 'Tier 2 Billing Escalations' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Tier 2 Billing Escalations' in the Groups list or group detail view within the CRM settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the group description is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Queue for complex billing and refund escalations.' in the description field of the 'Tier 2 Billing Escalations' group.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Administrator' user is added to the new group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Administrator' listed as a member or selected in the members list for the 'Tier 2 Billing Escalations' group.

task_completion.description: Verify a HelpDesk ticket titled 'Disputed Charge on Invoice #8472' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ticket title 'Disputed Charge on Invoice #8472' in the HelpDesk tickets list or ticket detail view.

task_completion.description: Verify the ticket Status is 'Open' and Priority is 'High'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Status 'Open' and Priority 'High' in the ticket details or list view.

task_completion.description: Verify the ticket description is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Customer is disputing a duplicate charge from last month's subscription renewal. Needs tier 2 review.' in the ticket description field.

task_completion.description: Verify the ticket is assigned to the 'Tier 2 Billing Escalations' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Assigned To' field in the ticket details showing the 'Tier 2 Billing Escalations' group.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to create the group and ticket.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the CRM web interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should display the genuine CRM application interface, not a text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of database management tools (like phpMyAdmin or mysql CLI) being used to insert records directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Group Name: 'Tier 2 Billing Escalations'. Expected Ticket Title: 'Disputed Charge on Invoice #8472'. Expected Status: 'Open'. Expected Priority: 'High'.
